<?php namespace Http\Message\Encoding; /** * Transform a regular stream into a chunked one. * * @author Joel Wurtz <joel.wurtz@gmail.com> */ class ChunkStream extends FilteredStream { protected function readFilter(): string { return 'chunk'; } protected function writeFilter(): string { return 'dechunk'; } protected function fill(): void { parent::fill(); if ($this->stream->eof()) { $this->buffer .= "0\r\n\r\n"; } } }
